name: Canopy height measurement
description: Canopy height was measured using a tape measure, from the soil surface to the leaf tip.

name: Leaf Nitrogen (Leaf N) measurement
description: Leaf N was measured using the Dumas combustion method with a LECO CN628 instrument.

name: Grain harvest for yield measurement
description: Grain was harvested using a Massey Ferguson 8XP combine, which is the instrument used in the process of obtaining grain for yield measurement.
